content.text:
Okay, got it. The Gemini API key got flagged as leaked. That's why memory search is broken right now.

I'll fix this first.

arguments.note: Disabled Gemini embeddings temporarily due to leaked API key. Memory will fall back to BM25 text search only.

content.text: Got it, fixing properly. First let's check current config first:

content.text:
✅ Fixed.

Gemini API key got flagged and banned by Google. Switched memory search to plain BM25 text only mode. No embeddings for now, memory search will work with exact text matches only. Gateway restarted successfully.

Yeah the summary was wrong, we do have activity. This was the broken embeddings error causing the cron job to not see recent messages.
